issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks across multiple workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were being enrolled in multiple workflows simultaneously, causing HAs and TCs to receive duplicate tasks. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. Madelaine worked with HubSpot support to resolve the filter issue.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks for deals that had already been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow filters were not correctly excluding these terminal deal stages. Madelaine made a tweak to the filters to stop tasks from triggering on closed or transferred deals.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any post-referral tasks that arrived after a deal was marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change on deal
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to display the previous LO's information rather than the updated one. The issue affected agent-facing automated emails. Luis resolved the issue on the product/backend side.
issues.workaround: For any deals where the LO was changed during the impact window, manually send the agent introduction email with the correct LO information.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering when deal stage flipped back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, reverted to a prior stage, and then moved back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow and closing tasks did not re-trigger on the second Offer Accepted update. The root cause was that deal stage re-enrollment criteria did not include the Offer Accepted stage. Madelaine added Offer Accepted as a re-enrollment criterion to fix the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted a second time during the impact window into the TC workflow to ensure closing tasks are generated.

issues.title: MRC Offer Accepted deals not enrolling TCs into workflow or generating tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering TC workflow enrollment or task creation. HAs were manually handling closing coordination as a result. Madelaine spoke with HubSpot support and confirmed the issue was resolved, though the specific root cause was not publicly stated.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals marked Offer Accepted between approximately March 14 and April 1 into the TC workflow and send closing info collection emails manually.
